question: Is the image a realistic photograph of a desert market stall under warm sunlight?
Is the upper portion of the frame horizontally covered by exactly 1 beige canvas awning?
Are the canopy edges tied tight with thin ropes that cast soft shadows?
Is there exactly 1 dark wood-toned stall table centered beneath the awning?
Are there exactly 3 pierced brass lanterns hanging above the table?
Are the lanterns arranged Left-Center-Right, with the left lantern closer to the camera and the right lantern closer to the frame's right edge?
Does the middle lantern emit a cool bluish light?
Are there exactly 4 spice containers arranged in a row at the center of the table?
Is the leftmost spice container a large woven wicker basket holding a heap of red powder?
Is the second container (from left) a shallow pottery bowl holding yellow fine powder?
Is the third container (from left) a shallow pottery bowl holding bright cyan-blue spice powder?
Is the rightmost container a shallow pottery bowl holding green spice with a smoothed flat surface?
Are there exactly 2 wooden spoons interacting with the spice containers?
Is one spoon inserted into the red spice with its handle pointing upper left, and the other resting on the yellow bowl rim with its handle pointing upper right?
Is there exactly 1 brass balance scale standing upright behind the table?
Are there exactly 2 teapots positioned side-by-side on the right side of the table?
Is the left teapot made of brass with a curved spout facing lower left?
Is the right teapot a square white porcelain teapot with its spout facing right?
Are there exactly 7 small transparent tea glasses aligned in a row in front of the teapots?
Do all 7 tea glasses have their openings facing upward?
Is there a light-colored tray at the front right holding exactly 7 dark brown dates?
Are the dried dates arranged in two rows and do they show visible wrinkled skin?
Is there a woven basket positioned to the left of the dried dates tray?
Does the woven basket hold exactly 6 oranges pressed against each other?
Are exactly 2 of the oranges purple-skinned, with the remainder being orange-colored?
Are there exactly 2 rolled carpets leaning left against the front edge of the table?
Is one carpet roll patterned with red complex designs and the other with deep blue patterns?
Are the carpet roll cross-sections facing the camera?
Are there exactly 2 brown leather coin pouches (half-open) at the table center-right?
Are there exactly 7 metal coins scattered in an arc in front of the pouch openings?
Are there exactly 3 strings of turquoise-colored beads at the frame's right table corner?
Are the beads coiled into circles and do they appear cube-faceted?
Is there exactly 1 stall vendor standing behind the table on the left side of the frame?
Is the vendor wearing a white long robe and a blue scarf?
Is the vendor's body turned slightly toward the frame right?
Is there exactly 1 camel standing in the rear right of the frame (outside the stall)?
Does the camel have a colorful blanket draped on its back?
Is the camel's head facing toward the frame left?
Are the main subjects (table, vendor, camel, merchandise) clearly visible and not cut off?
Is the image free from obvious anatomical distortions on the vendor (e.g., malformed hands/face)?
Is the image free from obvious anatomical distortions on the camel (e.g., malformed legs/head)?
Is the image free from severe rendering artifacts (e.g., floating objects, melting geometry)?
